examples.title: Pseudocode: Compiler Phases
examples.description: Demonstrates the six phases of compilation
examples.code:
BEGIN
 LexicalAnalysis()
 SyntaxAnalysis()
 SemanticAnalysis()
 IntermediateCodeGeneration()
 CodeOptimization()
 CodeGeneration()
END
examples.explanation: Each phase is responsible for a specific task in the compilation process

examples.title: Python: Lexical Analysis
examples.explanation: Tokenization is the process of breaking source code into individual tokens

examples.title: C: Syntax Analysis
examples.explanation: Parsing is the process of analyzing tokens to ensure they form a valid program
